note: F-002 re-test: prior failures sf08/sf13 @3 runs + 3 fresh common-knowledge claims @3 runs + 6 should-NOT @2 runs (over-trigger regression).

queries.query: Someone told me lightning never strikes the same place twice. True or false?
Is it true bananas are berries but strawberries are not?
Is it true that we only have five senses?
Bulls hate the color red, right?
Is it accurate that the tongue has separate zones for sweet, sour, salty and bitter?
Write me a deep, multi-source research report on the state of solid-state battery commercialization.
I need a thorough multi-source analysis of remote-work productivity trends with citations.
深入研究一下台灣半導體產業的競爭格局，給我一份完整的報告
Here is my finished essay. Can you check that every citation actually supports the claim it is attached to and flag dead links?
Audit the references in this draft document and tell me which sources are misattributed.
Help me deeply understand this 60-page research paper, section by section.
